purpose: Models the cutting tool interface responsible for tool positioning accuracy, rigidity, and orientation repeatability. Captures degradation of positioning accuracy from velocity loop gain drift, rigidity loss from motor power control issues, and orientation accuracy loss from gear ratio parameter errors. Monitors fault conditions that compromise tool placement and spindle orientation.

states.name: positioning_accuracy_degradation
states.description: Cutting tool positioning accuracy health factor, degrading from 1.0 (perfect) to 0.0 (failed) due to velocity loop gain drift and mechanical wear. Derived from bearing_wear degradation mechanism as the closest simulator match; rate derived from degradation_timescale since no exact simulator rate is assigned to this state.

states.name: interface_rigidity_degradation
states.description: Tool interface rigidity health factor, degrading from 1.0 (perfect) to 0.0 (failed) due to motor power control issues and thermal cycling. Mapped to preload_degradation mechanism as the closest simulator match for thermal-mechanical rigidity loss.

states.name: orientation_accuracy_degradation
states.description: Orientation stop accuracy health factor, degrading from 1.0 (perfect) to 0.0 (failed) due to improper or drifting gear ratio settings and thermal stress. Mapped to grease_degradation mechanism as the closest simulator match for long-term parameter drift.

states.name: thermal_stress_accumulation
states.description: Accumulated thermal stress in the tool interface and motor assembly. Rises during operation and decays toward ambient when idle. Used as a threshold state for motor overheat event detection, replacing direct input references per event rules.

states.name: velocity_error_accumulation
states.description: Accumulated velocity error magnitude in the spindle drive loop. Increases as positioning_accuracy_degradation worsens and decays when the drive is healthy. Used as a threshold state for excessive velocity error detection.

states.name: feedback_signal_integrity
states.description: Health of the position coder feedback signal path. Degrades from 1.0 (clean, connected) to 0.0 (disconnected or corrupted) driven by contamination from metallic wear particles. Mapped to contamination_level mechanism.

states.name: sensor_polarity_state
states.description: Configuration flag representing position sensor polarity correctness. 1.0 = correct polarity, 0.0 = incorrect polarity. Only changes on discrete user/maintenance action (parameter re-commissioning). Not included in state transition equations.

states.name: gear_ratio_parameter_state
states.description: Configuration flag representing gear ratio parameter validity. 1.0 = within valid range, 0.0 = out of valid range. Only changes on discrete user/maintenance action (parameter correction). Not included in state transition equations.

events.name: motor_overheat
events.description: Motor overheat condition detected when thermal_stress_accumulation exceeds the overheat_threshold (140.0 degC). event_state = 1.0 when healthy (temperature below threshold), 0.0 when fault is active.

events.name: excessive_velocity_error
events.description: Velocity error exceeds allowable limits when velocity_error_accumulation is elevated and positioning_accuracy_degradation has fallen below the critical_bearing_wear threshold (0.8 health remaining). event_state = 1.0 when healthy, 0.0 when fault is active.

events.name: position_sensor_polarity_incorrect
events.description: Position sensor polarity setting is incorrect. Triggered when sensor_polarity_state drops to 0.0 (incorrect configuration). event_state = 1.0 when polarity is correct, 0.0 when incorrect.

events.name: position_coder_disconnected
events.description: Position coder feedback signal lost when feedback_signal_integrity degrades below the feedback_loss_threshold. event_state = 1.0 when signal is healthy, 0.0 when signal is lost or critically degraded.

events.name: gear_ratio_parameter_error
events.description: Gear ratio parameter out of valid range. Triggered when gear_ratio_parameter_state is 0.0 (invalid configuration) or orientation_accuracy_degradation falls below the orientation_critical_threshold. event_state = 1.0 when healthy, 0.0 when fault is active.

parameters.name: positioning_accuracy_degradation_rate
parameters.description: Rate at which positioning accuracy health degrades per unit time, driven by load cycles and speed. Derived from degradation_timescale (no exact simulator rate assigned); set conservatively close to bearing_wear_rate as the nearest semantic match.

parameters.name: interface_rigidity_degradation_rate
parameters.description: Rate at which interface rigidity health degrades per unit time, driven by thermal cycling and wear. Matched to preload_degradation_rate from simulator ground truth.

parameters.name: orientation_accuracy_degradation_rate
parameters.description: Rate at which orientation accuracy health degrades per unit time, driven by thermal stress and oxidation. Matched to grease_degradation_rate from simulator ground truth as the closest semantic match for long-term parameter drift.

parameters.name: feedback_signal_degradation_rate
parameters.description: Rate at which feedback signal integrity degrades per unit time, driven by metallic wear particle contamination. Matched to contamination_buildup_rate from simulator ground truth.

parameters.name: thermal_stress_rise_rate
parameters.description: Rate at which thermal stress accumulates in the motor and tool interface during active operation.

parameters.name: thermal_stress_decay_rate
parameters.description: Rate at which thermal stress dissipates toward ambient when the component is idle or lightly loaded.

parameters.name: thermal_stress_ambient
parameters.description: Ambient reference temperature toward which thermal stress decays.

parameters.name: thermal_stress_capacity
parameters.description: Maximum thermal stress accumulation limit for the motor and interface assembly.

parameters.name: velocity_error_rise_rate
parameters.description: Rate at which velocity error accumulates as positioning accuracy degrades.

parameters.name: velocity_error_decay_rate
parameters.description: Rate at which velocity error dissipates when the drive loop is healthy.

parameters.name: velocity_error_capacity
parameters.description: Maximum velocity error accumulation limit before saturation.

parameters.name: overheat_threshold
parameters.description: Thermal stress level above which motor overheat fault (SP0001) is triggered. From simulator ground truth.

parameters.name: critical_bearing_wear
parameters.description: Positioning accuracy health level below which excessive velocity error warning (SP0002) becomes active. From simulator ground truth.

parameters.name: velocity_error_fault_threshold
parameters.description: Velocity error accumulation level above which excessive velocity error warning (SP0002) is triggered.

parameters.name: feedback_loss_threshold
parameters.description: Feedback signal integrity level below which position coder disconnected fault (SP0027) is triggered.

parameters.name: orientation_critical_threshold
parameters.description: Orientation accuracy health level below which gear ratio parameter error (SP0035) is considered active from degradation alone.

parameters.name: load_cycle_driver_scale
parameters.description: Scaling factor normalizing the load_cycles_and_speed driver for positioning accuracy degradation rate computation.

parameters.name: thermal_cycle_driver_scale
parameters.description: Scaling factor normalizing the thermal_cycling_and_wear driver for interface rigidity degradation rate computation.

parameters.name: thermal_stress_driver_scale
parameters.description: Scaling factor normalizing the thermal_stress_and_oxidation driver for orientation accuracy degradation rate computation.

parameters.name: contamination_driver_scale
parameters.description: Scaling factor normalizing the metallic_wear_particles driver for feedback signal integrity degradation rate computation.

state_transition_logic: positioning_accuracy_degradation: decrease by positioning_accuracy_degradation_rate * load_cycle_driver_scale * dt; clamp to [0.0, 1.0].
interface_rigidity_degradation: decrease by interface_rigidity_degradation_rate * thermal_cycle_driver_scale * dt; clamp to [0.0, 1.0].
orientation_accuracy_degradation: decrease by orientation_accuracy_degradation_rate * thermal_stress_driver_scale * dt; clamp to [0.0, 1.0].
feedback_signal_integrity: decrease by feedback_signal_degradation_rate * contamination_driver_scale * dt; clamp to [0.0, 1.0].

thermal_stress_accumulation: if component is active, increase by thermal_stress_rise_rate * dt; otherwise decay toward thermal_stress_ambient by thermal_stress_decay_rate * dt; clamp to [0.0, thermal_stress_capacity].

velocity_error_accumulation: if positioning_accuracy_degradation < critical_bearing_wear, increase by velocity_error_rise_rate * (1.0 - positioning_accuracy_degradation) * dt; otherwise decay by velocity_error_decay_rate * dt; clamp to [0.0, velocity_error_capacity].
sensor_polarity_state: static — no transition equation; only updated on discrete maintenance action.
gear_ratio_parameter_state: static — no transition equation; only updated on discrete maintenance action.
output_logic: This component has no output ports as defined in the triage entry. All observable quantities are captured through state evolution and event logic.

Internally: effective positioning accuracy is proportional to positioning_accuracy_degradation health factor — as it approaches 0.0, positioning error grows toward critical_position_error (2000.0 units).
Internally: effective interface rigidity is proportional to interface_rigidity_degradation health factor — as it approaches 0.0, the interface becomes compliant and susceptible to chatter.
Internally: effective orientation repeatability is proportional to orientation_accuracy_degradation health factor — as it approaches 0.0, spindle orientation stop accuracy is lost.
Internally: feedback signal quality is proportional to feedback_signal_integrity — as it approaches 0.0, position coder feedback becomes unreliable or absent.
event_logic: motor_overheat (SP0001): event_state = 1.0 if thermal_stress_accumulation < overheat_threshold, else 0.0. Under healthy initial conditions thermal_stress_accumulation = 25.0 < 140.0, so event_state = 1.0.

excessive_velocity_error (SP0002): event_state = 1.0 if velocity_error_accumulation < velocity_error_fault_threshold AND positioning_accuracy_degradation >= critical_bearing_wear, else 0.0. Under healthy initial conditions velocity_error_accumulation = 0.0 < 500.0 and positioning_accuracy_degradation = 1.0 >= 0.8, so event_state = 1.0.
position_sensor_polarity_incorrect (SP0021): event_state = 1.0 if sensor_polarity_state == 1.0, else 0.0. Under healthy initial conditions sensor_polarity_state = 1.0, so event_state = 1.0.

position_coder_disconnected (SP0027): event_state = 1.0 if feedback_signal_integrity > feedback_loss_threshold, else 0.0. Under healthy initial conditions feedback_signal_integrity = 1.0 > 0.2, so event_state = 1.0.

gear_ratio_parameter_error (SP0035): event_state = 1.0 if gear_ratio_parameter_state == 1.0 AND orientation_accuracy_degradation > orientation_critical_threshold, else 0.0. Under healthy initial conditions gear_ratio_parameter_state = 1.0 and orientation_accuracy_degradation = 1.0 > 0.2, so event_state = 1.0.
assumptions: The triage entry specifies no input or output ports; this component operates as an internal state-and-event monitor with no external signal interface in the current model scope.

positioning_accuracy_degradation_rate is set to 0.02 (matching bearing_wear_rate) as the closest simulator semantic match, since no exact rate is assigned to this state in the simulator ground truth. This is noted as an approximation.
interface_rigidity_degradation_rate is matched to preload_degradation_rate (0.015) based on shared thermal-mechanical degradation mechanism.
orientation_accuracy_degradation_rate is matched to grease_degradation_rate (0.03) based on shared long-term thermal stress and oxidation mechanism driving parameter drift.

feedback_signal_integrity is introduced as a new degradation state (not in candidate_states) to provide a threshold_states basis for position_coder_disconnected (SP0027), which references a physical signal loss condition that cannot be tracked via input ports per event rules.

thermal_stress_accumulation is introduced as a new accumulation state to provide a threshold_states basis for motor_overheat (SP0001), replacing any direct input temperature reference per event rules.

velocity_error_accumulation is introduced as a new accumulation state to provide a threshold_states basis for excessive_velocity_error (SP0002), replacing any direct input velocity error reference per event rules.

sensor_polarity_state and gear_ratio_parameter_state are modeled as static states representing commissioning/configuration correctness; they are initialized to 1.0 (correct) and only change on discrete maintenance actions.
thermal_stress_rise_rate (2.0 degC/cycle) and decay_rate (1.0 degC/cycle) are engineering estimates; they should be calibrated against simulator thermal data.
velocity_error_rise_rate (5.0 rpm/cycle) and decay_rate (2.0 rpm/cycle) are engineering estimates; they should be calibrated against simulator velocity loop data.

All degradation state initial_values are set to 1.0 (fully healthy) per degradation state_type convention, overriding the triage entry's initial_value of 0.0 which appears to represent degradation amount rather than health factor.
The component has no outputs in this model version; if future integration requires output ports (e.g., position_error_mm, rigidity_index), they should be added via a new triage revision.

critical_position_error (2000.0) from simulator ground truth is noted as the physical limit for positioning error but is not directly observable as an output in this portless model; it informs the severity of positioning_accuracy_degradation reaching 0.0.
